name: Trench Alpha
description: Ten feet of mud and desperate engineering, and you can read the repair history in the walls if you know what to look for — patches on top of patches on top of original work, each one a different campaign. The iron plate reinforcing the sides carries the wrong army's markings in places. Nobody mentions this. The sky above is the color of a bruise that's been there long enough to be just part of the face. The eastern perimeter has a fresher repair than the rest. The Rock-Shell Crabs find the weak spots. They always do. The crabs have been doing this for longer than anyone currently stationed here has been alive.
